description:
Oʻzbek bizneslarida hammasi yaxshi faqat cho‘kishyaptimi yoki suzishyaptimi bilishmaydi

Sizga aytsam so‘nggi bir necha oyda 100 dan ortiq biznes egalari bilan gaplashdim. Deyarli hammada bir xil gap, CRM bor, sotuv jamoasi bor, funnel qurilgan, raqamlar kuzatilayapti.

Lekin ulardan “mijoz telefonda nima deyapti, bilasizmi?” deb so‘rasam jimjitlik. Hech kim bilmaydi. Chunki hech kim eshitmayapti.

Bizda CRM madaniyati bor. Lead kirdi, deal ochildi, von/lost belgilandi. Bu yaxshi va kerakli narsa. Lekin CRM sizga faqat nima bo‘lganini ko‘rsatadi. Nima uchun bo‘lganini emas.

Mijoz nega rad qildi? Operator nima dedi? Qaysi so‘zda mijoz bezishni boshladi? Bu javoblar CRMʼda yo‘q. Bu javoblar qo‘ng‘iroqlarning ichida.

Biz Aisha AIʼda aynan shu muammoni yechyapmiz, va o‘zimiz ham o‘z sotuv voronkamizda ishlatyapmiz. Aslida oldinroq boshlashimiz kerak edi, lekin hechdan ko‘ra kech.

Maslahat: ertaga bitta qo‘ng‘iroqni boshidan oxirigacha eshitib ko‘ring. Faqat bitta. Mijoz nima deyapti, haqiqatan eshiting. Ko‘p narsa o‘zgarishi mumkin.

Sizning kompaniyangizda qo‘ng‘iroqlar qanday tahlil qilinadi? Yoki umuman qilinmayaptimi? Qiziq.

P/s: CRMʼga pul to‘lab, lekin qo‘ng‘iroqlarni eshitmayotgan bo‘lsangiz, bu shifokorga borib, faqat ism familiya manzilingizni aytib, qaytib ketishga o‘xshaydi.

@elzodxon

Central Eurasian Venture Forum 2026: Where Deals Are Made

Central Eurasian Venture Forum Tashkent is an investment platform bringing together venture funds, private investors, institutional capital, corporations, and technology startups.

📅 April 3, 2026
 📍JW Marriott Hotel Tashkent, Uzbekistan

Within the forum program:
- Startup Alley – a startup exhibition and direct access zone to early-stage projects.
- MOST Investable Battle – startups pitch their projects to venture funds and private investors.
- Closed Investor Sessions – private networking, GP–LP meetings, and roundtable discussions.
- VC Party – Continue networking after the forum at the official afterparty.
- CEVF Retreat – A closed outdoor event for a selected group of participants.

Among the forum speakers: Murat Abdrakhmanov, one of the largest and most active venture investors in Central Asia; Aynur Zhanturina, CEO of RISE Research; venture investor Yerlan Issekeshev; Abay Absamet, Co-Founder of Silkroad Angels; as well as Baurzhan Kankin, Alexander Zemlyak, and Ivan Belokhvostikov.

✈️ Choose direct flights to Tashkent with Air Astana — the Official Airline Partner of CEVF 2026.

Promo code ELZODXON15 gives you 15% off all forum ticket categories.

📌Activate your promo code at:
 https://ventureforum.asia

Claude Pro’ni 3 oy davomida 50% (10$) chegirma bilan ishlatish mumkin.

Nima qilish kerak:

1. Claude.ai’da yangi akkaunt ochasiz.

1, Keyin bu https://claude.ai/alex havolaga o‘tasiz va Pro tarifda chegirma chiqishi kerak. Agar chiqmasa, inkognito mode’da qaytadan qiling.

3. Kartangizni kiritasiz va birinchi oy uchun $11 yechib olinadi ($10 + soliq).

Endi mazza qilib Claude Code ishlating =)

Do‘stim Ilhom Maqsadqulov chegirma haqida xabar bergani uchun katta rahmat!

-------

@farkhod_com

Email'ni tekshiraman, Canvas dasturi bor, lekin baribir universitetdaig deadline'larni o'tkazib yuborayotgandim. 

Canvas'dan keladigan notificationlarni telegramga keladigan qilib qo'ydim. Boshida faqat o'zim uchun qilmoqchi edim, keyin mayli hamma uchun kerak bo'lsa kerak deb launch qildim.

2 kuncha oldin botni claude code'da 1 soatda yozdim, keyin universitetdagi hamma talabalarga email orqali yetkazdim. Hozircha 30 ta odam aktiv ishlatyabdi. 

3 ta universitet talabalari ishlatyabdi: AUT, Webster(Abdulazizga aytgandim), Mizzou(Akbarga aytgandim).

Bot: @canvasassistantbot

what a time to be alive
Sotib qo'ygan funksionallarimiz tayyor emas, yetvolishimiz kerak.

Uzbekistan Joins the Global Techstars Network 🚀

​For the first time, local founders can join Founder Catalyst: a free, 10-week online pre-accelerator designed to make your startup investment-ready and ready to scale.

​What’s Inside:
- ​Mentorship: 1:1 sessions with experts who have built unicorn companies.
- ​Masterclasses: Practical sessions on Product-Market Fit, scaling, and operational excellence.
- ​Pitch Coaching: Refine your pitch deck for investors.
- ​Bonuses: Access to credits for AWS, Google Cloud, Stripe, and more.
- ​Networking: Join a global cohort of founders from the US, UK, Turkey, and beyond.

​⏳ Applications close: February 13, 2026.
For more and registration: https://www.techstars.com/techstars-founder-catalyst-global-spring-2026-program
Claude Code top. tried on the server and loved it. goood debugger.

Vibecoder akani serveriga Coolify o‘rnatib, uni Run4j yordamida Telegram botga uladik. Qulay tarafi shundaki, endi serverni shunchaki ovozli xabarlar bilan boshqarish imkoniyati bor.

Ovozni matnga aylantirish uchun Aisha AI xizmatidan foydalandik.

Bu yechim boshqalarga ham asqotib qolar deb, Aisha AI bilan ishlash uchun kerakli skriptlarni Run4j marketplace’ga joylab qo‘ydik. Agar ovozli funksiyalari bor loyiha qilmoqchi bo‘lsangiz, bemalol kirib ishlatib ko‘rishingiz mumkin.


🔗 Docker Hub: https://hub.docker.com/r/run4j/run4j-community
🌐 Sayt: https://run4j.com 
📖 Dokumentatsiya: https://docs.run4j.com
☁️ Cloud install: https://docs.run4j.com/en/install-cloud
🔗 Docker install: https://docs.run4j.com/en/install-docker
📨 Telegram: @run4j
❓ Savol va takliflar uchun: @java_maniac

Rulda ketayotgandim, srochna javob berish kerak edi va tanimagan odamga ovozli xabar yuborish/qabul qilish ozgina noqulay tuyuladi. Telegramga kirdim, @aishaovozbot'ga kirib, ovozli xabar yozdim va copy/paste qilib jo'natvordim.
